info.english_meaning: to kill to hurt to hit to strike to injure
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' mokzaRe jasyatIti syARRAvatrArTe tu jaMsayet  hiMsAtAqanayorDAtvoH uditorjAsayediti ' (Slo . 188 - 189) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'sa tvamujjAsyamAnAsu prajAsu' (rA0 710411) ujjAsyamAnAsu hiMsyamAnAsa ucCabdo jAsayatinA sAhacaryaM dyotayati nArTaM viSinazwi etatsAhacaryamapaBraMSepi lakzyata ityavyaBicArIdam
